task: NCAL-1 — CalDAV read client + session-gated GET /api/calendar/events
why: Server-only CalDAV client sends Basic Auth credentials to an external Nextcloud instance and exposes results via a session-gated endpoint. Credentials must never reach the browser or a plaintext log; a Nextcloud 401 must be masked as a generic 503; ATTACH/SOUND must be stripped; the CalDAV time-range must be formatted from parsed Date objects (XML-injection guard); and RRULE expansion must be clamped (authenticated-DoS guard).
